name: swiss-apartment-management
description: Modular property-management platform for Swiss STWEG / condominium associations
author: Stefan Müller <stefan-ffr@users.noreply.github.com>

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @sam/core build && pnpm --filter @sam/module-verteiler build && pnpm --filter @sam/module-drucker build && pnpm -r --filter '!@sam/core' --filter '!@sam/module-verteiler' --filter '!@sam/module-drucker' build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @sam/core build && pnpm --filter @sam/module-verteiler build && pnpm --filter @sam/module-drucker build && pnpm -r typecheck
